default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Regroup with Jacob McPhail regarding the Managing Editor position at fwd.digital and discuss onboarding logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth with 35 open opportunities, including 8 in late stages](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [The company is implementing a pod structure led by managing editors to scale operations efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Jacob will officially start on January 1st, with early access to onboarding materials and team connections](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [The company is actively hiring for 2 pod leads and 6 account managers to meet growing demand](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Recent Milestones

  - [fwd.digital officially announced on LinkedIn, generating 100,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Currently have 35 open opportunities, with 8 in late stages](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Signed two new clients recently, including a verbal agreement from a joint outset](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Experiencing high demand, with potential to double current client base](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Pod Structure and Scaling Strategy

  - [Implementing a pod structure led by managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Each pod typically includes:](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [1 pod lead (managing editor)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [2-3 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [\~3 writers (varies based on account needs)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Fully ramped pod handles \~5-6 accounts; ramping pods start with \~3 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Account complexity and revenue impact pod structure (e.g., $39k/month account requires special consideration)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### Onboarding and Role Expectations

  - [Jacob to start officially on January 1st, with early access to materials](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Access to be provided for:](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Slack](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Company email](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Notion (containing workflows, trainings, and onboarding checklists)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Recordings of previous workshops (particularly the 5-hour third cohort workshop)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Opportunity to connect with existing team members for insights](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

### Client Acquisition and Revenue Growth

  - [3-4 new accounts starting in January](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [2 accounts booked for February (1 signed, 1 verbal agreement)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Potential for 6-8 new accounts between January and February](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Some clients exploring large-scale content projects (e.g., 5-30k pages in regulated industry)](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### Team Expansion and Hiring Needs

  - [Actively hiring for 2 pod leads and 6 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Focus on finding candidates with potential to grow into leadership roles](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Emphasis on thoughtful team members who can contribute to process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to set up Jacob's access to Remote, email, and other systems](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Kyle to facilitate introductions to existing team members for Jacob to connect with](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Jacob to review onboarding materials, particularly the 3rd cohort workshop recording](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Team to consider inviting Jacob to any important meetings before official start date](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Jacob to continue offboarding current clients in preparation for January 1st start](https://fathom.video/share/ZBE-BwPndKxGu9AU2yHSq1zBeb52eo75?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

action_items.description: Connect Jacob w/ Andre + other relevant team members (2+ months tenure). Facilitate intros.
Set up Jacob in Remote + email. Send Slack invite. Once in Slack, send workshop links.
Invite Jacob to any important team meetings scheduled before year-end.
